customAttributes.description:
From Cute to Brute

At the beginning of your upkeep, look at the top card of your library. You may reveal that card. If an instant or sorcery card is revealed this way, transform Delver of Secrets.
//
Insectile Aberration
Flying
customAttributes.fullType: Creature — Human Wizard / Creature — Human Insect
customAttributes.flavorText:
Insects always occupied a special place in the wizard's heart.
Now insects occupy a special place in his lungs, intestines, liver, kidneys, eyeballs . . .
